name: Table.bm / Bermuda Restaurant Weeks
description: Bermuda's premier dining discovery platform and Restaurant Week organiser. Table.bm lists prix-fixe menus and special offers from over 40 participating restaurants twice a year (spring and fall editions). One of the best ways to sample high-end Bermudian dining at accessible prices — restaurants that normally run $60–80 per head offer 3-course prix-fixe menus for around $40.
